Session.title: Session
Session.description: A conversation session for the law chatbot

title.description: The title or subject of the conversation

userId.description: The Firebase Authentication UID of the user who owns this session

Message.title: Message
Message.description: An individual chat message within a session

role.description: The role of the dynamic message sender

content.description: The markdown or text formatted conversation content

groundingMetadata.description: Optional search grounding metadata returned by the Google Gemini API

/sessions/{sessionId}.description: Collection of chat sessions owned by authenticated users
